title: Draxoladle Music Discs
description: Adds music discs of the music from my game known as Draxoladle!
body: This pack adds music discs of the music from my game known as [Draxoladle](https://dumpstar-fire-dev.itch.io/draxoladle)! The discs can be purchaced from wandering traders which have a chance to sell some of the discs! There are a total of 3 discs to collect!
